title: Pets & Play Squeaky Dog Ball 6 Pack | Upgraded Durable Dog Balls | Strong & Sturdy | Bouncy Rubber Dog Toys for Training & Boredom | Chew Dog Ball Multipack | Xmas Present Gift | Small & Medium Dogs
features: 【UPGRADED 2025 DESIGN】Here at Pets & Play, we carefully evaluated numerous rubber dog ball designs to identify the most durable, resilient, and engaging. We upgraded a popular previous design, as our goal is to ensure top-quality squeaky balls, as many options available on the market tend to break too easily.

【NON-TOXIC SMELL】There may be a potential smell when the box is first opened, rest assured it is not harmful. We had this fixed by having our manufacturer air out the balls for a week, but it seems recently there were some batches that this wasnt done correctly for. We do apologise, but IT IS SAFE for your dog! (Leaving it outdoors for a couple days does the trick)

【FLOATS】Perfect for the swimming pool, paddling pools, lakes or any water your doggo loves to dive into as the balls will float (and any water that gets in when squeezed under water, can simply be squeezed right back out)

【DOG-SAFE MATERIAL】Our 6.5cm large dog balls are made from Thermoplastic Rubber (TPR), which is non-toxic and safe for dogs, ensuring that if they chew or gnaw on the unbreakable dog ball, they won’t be exposed to harmful substances. Safety always first! (As we only use BRAND NEW materials, there may be a glue smell as these are fresh of the factory floor, but are safe!)

【READY TO GIFT】The chewy dog ball set arrives in a premium gift box, unlike others on the market that come in plastic bags. It also doubles as storage for travel. A great little Christmas or Birthday present for dog owners and fellow pet parents.

【UK BRAND】Pets & Play is founded by passionate pet owners. Our mission is to deliver high-quality multipack dog toys and accessories, designed with the needs of pets and their owners in mind. We hope both you and your furry companion enjoy the results of our commitment to excellence.
